title: 3 Bedroom Duplex to Let in Syokimau
description:
Spacious 3-Bedroom Duplex to Let in Syokimau – KES 35,000/month. Located in a quiet, gated court just off Mombasa Road, this well-designed duplex offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience for families or professionals.

The ground floor features a guest cloakroom, a bright open-plan living and dining area, and a functional kitchen with plenty of storage. Upstairs, the master bedroom comes with an en-suite bathroom and built-in wardrobes, while two additional bedrooms share a second bathroom.

Security is top-notch with 24/7 guard presence, electric fence, and intercom system. The compound is well-maintained with secure parking for two cars and common area backup power for essential lighting.

Water supply is reliable (borehole), and the property is minutes away from Gateway Mall, the SGR train station, and JKIA – making daily commuting stress-free. Whether you work in Nairobi or prefer the quieter life near Mombasa Road, this duplex is an excellent choice.

Call or WhatsApp 0723562484 to book a viewing today.

why_rent: This duplex offers a rare combination of space (1800 sq ft) and privacy within a quiet gated court, yet remains conveniently close to Mombasa Road, Gateway Mall, and the SGR station. Ideal for families who need easy access to Nairobi.

Modern 3-Bedroom Master Ensuite Apartment to Let in Syokimau – KES 55,000/month. Located in a secure, serene compound with premium amenities including a gym and swimming pool, this apartment offers exceptional value for families and professionals who want easy access to Nairobi via Mombasa Road / Expressway.

The apartment features three well‑sized bedrooms; the master bedroom comes with an ensuite bathroom and fitted wardrobes. The other two bedrooms share a second bathroom, also with fitted storage. The large living room is bright and inviting, perfect for relaxing or entertaining guests. The modern kitchen is equipped with ample cabinetry and space for appliances.

The compound is meticulously maintained, with 24/7 security (guards and perimeter lighting) and dedicated parking for one car, plus visitor slots. Residents enjoy exclusive access to a well‑equipped gym and a clean swimming pool – perfect for unwinding after a long day or staying active.

Location is a major advantage: you are just minutes from the SGR Terminus (ideal for frequent travellers to Mombasa), JKIA (perfect for airport staff or frequent flyers), and Gateway Mall (for shopping, dining, and cinema). Commuting to Nairobi CBD is straightforward via Mombasa Road or the Expressway.

Whether you work in Nairobi or value a peaceful home with resort‑style amenities, this apartment delivers comfort and convenience. Call or WhatsApp 0723562484 to arrange a private viewing.

title: 4 Bedroom Mansion to Let in Kitengela

description:
Executive 4‑Bedroom All‑Ensuite Mansion to Let in Kitengela – KES 55,000/month. Located just 200 metres off the tarmac in a secure gated court, this stunning home sits on a private 50x100 plot, offering exceptional space and privacy for large families.

The spacious lounge and dining area flow seamlessly, creating an ideal environment for entertaining or family gatherings. The modern kitchen includes a pantry and ample storage, while a dedicated backyard laundry area adds everyday convenience.

Outside, the compound is well‑utilised: there is ample cabro‑floored parking with a car shade, and the grounds are easy to maintain. Security is top‑notch with a gated entrance, perimeter wall, and intercom system. Water supply is reliable 24/7, supported by an automatic pressure pump – no more worries about low pressure or outages.

The property’s location in the Yukos area is quiet yet accessible, just a short drive from Kitengela town centre, schools (Acacia Crest, Kitengela International), hospitals (Halisi Family Hospital), and shopping malls. For those commuting to Nairobi, the main Namanga Road is minutes away.
